title: Petface Honking and Squeaky Duck Plush Dog Toy
features: PET ENTERTAINMENT: Keep your furry friend entertained for hours with this squeaky duck plush toy, built-in squeaker for added fun
DURABLE DESIGN: Made to withstand rough play, perfect for tug-of-war or cuddle time
INSTINCTS: Encourages natural instincts to play and chew in a safe way
FEATURES: Soft and plush design that your pet will love to snuggle up with after a long day of playtime

TOY SAFETY: This toy is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to ‘chew’ damage, please supervise your pet with this toy, examine regularly for wear, and replace if any damage could be seen a health hazard
description: From the manufacturer Petface - your pets best friend - whether it's collars, leads, feeding, bedding or toys our product experts design with your pet in mind! The Petface range is of the highest quality and provides fun, innovative and interactive products to keep your pets fit, healthy and enjoying life! Shop for your favourite dog, cats and wild bird products! Petface Honking Duck Dog Toy Our Honking Duck Dog Toy is ideal for interactive play and will provide your dog or puppy with exercise and fun. Dogs are playful by nature; our Honking Duck will give your pet hours of fun and help to keep them fit and healthy. This soft plush toy is strong and durable, with a bright, attractive colour to enhance an enjoyable experience for playtime. About Petface... All your needs are covered with the Petface range, including collars, leads, toys, feeding, coats and bedding. The designers at Petface have ensured the range has a co-ordinated look and style making sure your pets will be the ‘best dressed in town’. Treat your pampered pooch! Treat your dog to their very own cuddly friend to keep them company in their dog basket or as a fun toy to help keep them occupied. The adorable cuddly dog toy makes fun squeaky sounds when pressed in the middle, so your dog won't be able to get enough of this soft toy! Your dog's best friend! Ideal for interactive play indoors or outdoors, the Honking Duck Dog Toy is great for throw and fetch or for keeping your dog amused when left to their own devices.
